# The Chauhans Hideaway

An exclusive luxury heritage wedding and event venue located in Devliya, Banar, Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India. Managed by CRS Chauhan Private Limited.

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](index.html): Overview of the venue, legacy, spaces, and booking.
- [About](about.html): Details about the hosts, the land, and the history.
- [Legacy](legacy.html): The 1,500-year historical chronicle of the Chauhan Rajputs.
- [Venue](venue.html): Details about the setting, spaces, and capacity.
- [Events](events.html): Types of events hosted (Weddings, Haldi, Sangeet, Corporate, Shoots).
- [Gallery](gallery.html): Visual archives and moments.
- [Availability](availability.html): Interactive calendar to check date availability.
- [Enquiry](enquiry.html): Concierge enquiry submission form.
- [Contact & Location](location.html): Travel distances, map, and contact details.

## Contact Information
- Email: gm.hideaway@outlook.com
- Phone/WhatsApp: +91 91217 73501
- Address: Devliya, Banar, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342027
